args.query: SELECT id, caseid__c, oldvalue__c, newvalue__c, field__c, createddate FROM casehistory__c ORDER BY createddate DESC LIMIT 20;

exec_args.sql: SELECT id, caseid__c, oldvalue__c, newvalue__c, field__c, createddate FROM casehistory__c ORDER BY createddate DESC LIMIT 20;

args.query: SELECT id, createddate, closeddate, ownerid FROM "Case" WHERE closeddate >= '2023-05-02' AND closeddate <= '2023-09-02';

exec_args.sql: SELECT id, createddate, closeddate, ownerid FROM "Case" WHERE closeddate >= '2023-05-02' AND closeddate <= '2023-09-02';

args.query: SELECT newvalue__c AS ownerid, COUNT(DISTINCT caseid__c) AS handled_cases FROM casehistory__c WHERE field__c = 'Owner Assignment' AND createddate >= '2023-05-02' AND createddate <= '2023-09-02' GROUP BY newvalue__c;

exec_args.sql: SELECT newvalue__c AS ownerid, COUNT(DISTINCT caseid__c) AS handled_cases FROM casehistory__c WHERE field__c = 'Owner Assignment' AND createddate >= '2023-05-02' AND createddate <= '2023-09-02' GROUP BY newvalue__c;

args.query: SELECT ch.caseid__c, SUM(CASE WHEN ch.field__c='Owner Assignment' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS owner_assign_count, MAX(ch.newvalue__c) FILTER (WHERE ch.field__c='Owner Assignment') AS ownerid FROM casehistory__c ch WHERE ch.caseid__c IN (SELECT id FROM "Case" WHERE closeddate >= '2023-05-02' AND closeddate <= '2023-09-02') GROUP BY ch.caseid__c;

exec_args.sql: SELECT ch.caseid__c, SUM(CASE WHEN ch.field__c='Owner Assignment' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS owner_assign_count, MAX(ch.newvalue__c) FILTER (WHERE ch.field__c='Owner Assignment') AS ownerid FROM casehistory__c ch WHERE ch.caseid__c IN (SELECT id FROM "Case" WHERE closeddate >= '2023-05-02' AND closeddate <= '2023-09-02') GROUP BY ch.caseid__c;
